subcodes.first_line: Hearken unto the Call from the precincts of the Prison: Verily, there is no God but Him, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting. Be thou enkindled with the fire [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان استمع الندآء من شطر السجن انه لا اله الا هو المهیمن القیوم کن مشتعلا بنار
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @love of God
